task_completion.description: GCompris application is open and running
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The 'Locate the region' geography activity is active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the GCompris geography/map activity interface.

task_completion.description: The selected map is South America
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displayed in the activity clearly shows the continent of South America.

task_completion.description: Progress of identified countries is visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is a score counter, progress bar, or visual highlighting on the map indicating that countries are being successfully located.

task_completion.description: At least 5 countries have been successfully identified
task_completion.visual_evidence: The in-game score, progress indicator, or map highlights clearly show that a minimum of 5 countries have been correctly identified.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the progress is saved to the expected path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window shows 'geography_score.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, an image viewer displays the image with that path, or a terminal shows a successful screenshot command targeting that exact path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine GCompris graphical user interface (cartoonish style, specific UI buttons) rather than a web browser search, a generic map image, or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-completed map image from the internet
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a web browser or terminal being used to download an image of a South America map to bypass playing the game.

integrity.description: The screenshots show genuine gameplay progression
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should ideally show the agent interacting with the game interface (e.g., mouse cursor over countries, intermediate scores) rather than just a sudden appearance of a completed state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot path is /home/ga/Documents/geography_score.png. South America contains 12 independent countries. The task requires identifying at least 5 of them in the GCompris 'Locate the region' activity.
